title: California Colleges Interest Profiler workflow
steps: Log into CaliforniaColleges.edu with school email
Record top interests and research three careers
Pick one career and find a day-in-the-life video

summary: Students under 18 generally need a work permit before starting a job. In SMUHSD, the B1-1 request is completed by student, parent/guardian, and employer, then processed by the school/district career center process.
student_steps: Download/print B1-1 Request for Work Permit
Employer completes and signs employer section
Submit completed form to school College & Career Center or designated staff
Wait for processing before starting work
important_notes: Work permits are school-district issued in California
Entertainment work permits are handled separately
School sites may have additional GPA/attendance requirements
Work permits may need renewal each school year
